validation.command: node --check src/control-plane/runs.js; node --check src/control-plane/actions.js; node --check src/control-plane/inspect.js; node --check src/cli.js
validation.summary: All T027 production entrypoints parse successfully.
16 tests run, 12 passed, 4 failed. T027 stale status and reconcile tests passed, all lifecycle ownership tests passed, and the remaining failures map to T028/T031 work.

controllerChecks: launchdeck reconcile is wired as a CLI command and routes through src/control-plane/actions.js.
Reconcile observes run-index and OS liveness evidence, marks Launchdeck-owned missing processes stale, repairs local state, and appends run.stale events.
Reconcile does not call process.kill, stopProcess, or any kill-by-port/PID path.
Stale status is visible through status --all and inspect next actions without silently deleting evidence.
Still-running active records are reported as unresolved with inspect next actions instead of being stopped.
Leader validation confirmed the T027 stale/reconcile tests pass while lifecycle ownership tests remain green.
Leader process scan after validation found no recovery/log-follow fixture processes left.
acceptedResidualRisks: events --json remains unimplemented and is owned by T028.
logs --follow --json JSONL streaming and redaction remain unimplemented and are owned by T028.
clean --safe retention for running/latest-failure diagnostic evidence remains a later US4 cleanup task.
followUpWork: T028 implement events command plus logs --follow JSONL and redaction behavior without weakening reconcile semantics.
T031 or the retention owner must preserve active/latest-failure evidence during safe clean.
